productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Dark Brown Formal Shoes
description: Take semi-formal dressing to the next level with these slip-on leather shoes from red tape. With comfort and style rolled into one, these shoes are great for those who are looking for a fuss-free way to look stylish.UpperFull leather upper for maximum durability, breathability and styleSlip-on system for easy wear and removalElastic inserts on the sides of the tongue for a snug, customised FitStitch detailing to enhance shoe lifeCurved and padded collar with a fabric inner for comfortBrand badge on the lateral sideMidsole adhered to the outsoleOutsoleTextured grooves for grip and tractionScooped mid heel for cushioned comfortRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleShoe CareWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
